obligation: C5 active-path (F64, one layer at a time)
oracle: HuggingFace MixtralDecoderLayer in float64, ONE layer at a time (trusted HF code: GQA + RoPE + sparse MoE; never the whole model in F64 -> not L4)
note: Real Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1 weights, full end-to-end forward. ADR-007 C5 F64 form. Driver validated against the tiny mixtral_scale fixture before this run.
